headline: Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US CEO Mark Kuntz Announces His Retirement
summary: SUWANEE, Ga., March 10, 2026--Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US LLC today announced that Mark Kuntz will retire as Chief Executive Officer, effective March 31, 2026.

headline: Is 3M (MMM) Turning Scotch-Brite’s Design Makeover Into a Deeper Consumer-Brand Reset?
summary: In early March 2026, 3M Company launched Brite by Scotch-Brite, a new design-forward line of cleaning tools now available at Target, Walmart, and Amazon, featuring colorful scrubbers, dishwands, palm scrubbers, and matching Drain & Dry Stands. By turning everyday sponges and scrubbers into counter-worthy accessories promoted across social media and a "Sparkle Squad" of ambassadors, 3M is leaning into home décor and lifestyle branding within its core consumer segment.
